30 doctrines shown · Jurisdiction: Federal
1
Asset Protection
Spendthrift Trust

Protects trust assets from beneficiary's creditors. Beneficiary cannot assign or pledge trust interest.

2
Formation
Resulting Trust

Implied trust arising when express trust fails or purchase price paid by one party but title in another.

3
Beneficiary Rights
Constructive Trust

Equitable remedy imposed to prevent unjust enrichment. Not a true trust — a device to transfer property.

4
Formation
Charitable Trust

Trust for charitable purposes — education, religion, relief of poverty, promotion of health.

5
Asset Protection
Land Trust

Holds real property with privacy protection. Beneficiary's identity concealed from public records.

6
UCC / Secured
UCC § 9-203
UCC Article 9 Secured Interest

Security interest in personal property and fixtures. Creation, attachment, and perfection through filing.

7
Formation
Inter Vivos Trust

Living trust created during settlor's lifetime. Can be revocable or irrevocable.

8
Formation
Testamentary Trust

Trust created by will, taking effect at testator's death. Subject to probate.

9
Trustee Duties
Discretionary Trust

Trustee has discretion regarding distribution of income or principal to beneficiaries.

10
Formation
Totten Trust

Bank account "In Trust For" — tentative trust revocable by depositor.

11
Termination
Cy Pres Doctrine

Court modifies charitable trust purpose when original purpose becomes impossible or impractical.

12
Termination
Merger Doctrine

Trust terminates when sole trustee is also sole beneficiary — same person cannot hold both interests.

13
Termination
Rule Against Perpetuities

No interest in property is valid unless it must vest, if at all, not later than 21 years after a life in being.

14
Trustee Duties
Prudent Investor Rule

Trustee must invest as a prudent investor considering risk and return. Portfolio theory applies.

15
Trustee Duties
Duty of Loyalty

Trustee must administer trust solely in beneficiaries' interests. No self-dealing.

16
Tax Planning
QTIP Trust

Qualified Terminable Interest Property trust for marital deduction. Spouse receives all income.

17
